# decision-trail — Copilot instructions

This file is intentionally thin. For working in this repo, the entry point is
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root — the terse reference for the
contract, lifecycle, layout, conventions, and agent guidance. New to the method?
Read the guide first: [`guide.md`](../guide.md). (The canonical method spec lives
in [`starter/docs/working-method.md`](../starter/docs/working-method.md); this
repo's `AGENTS.md` is a derived rendering of it.)

**Read [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) first.** It is tool-agnostic. Everything you
need to work in this repo is there, including:

- the eight-promise contract,
- the idea → proposal → decision → plan → execution lifecycle and where each
  artifact lives,
- the cross-link vocabulary,
- the confirmation guard.

Do not duplicate that content here; keep this file a pointer so the two never
diverge (Economy, promise #2).
